descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes win 1987 Centennial Cup championship with 5-2 victory over Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes captured the Centennial Cup Canadian junior-A championship on May 10, 1987, defeating the Humboldt Broncos 5-2. Goaltender Frank Romeo earned most valuable player honours. The victory marks BC's second consecutive Canadian junior-A title. Most of Richmond's experienced core, including defenceman Matt Hervey, will age out as 20-year-olds and depart the team.
